Our Ibn Haldun University Campus Has Earned the Title of “Sports-Friendly Campus”

27.05.2025

Our university has been awarded the “Sports-Friendly Campus” certificate in recognition of its campus structure that promotes sports and its contributions to a sustainable sports culture.

Thanks to its infrastructure that encourages physical activity, its efforts to instill healthy lifestyle habits, and a campus climate that supports a culture of sports, our university has been honored with the “Sports-Friendly Campus” certificate granted by the Council of Higher Education and the Ministry of Youth and Sports.

This meaningful award documents the success of our efforts to enhance social interaction on campus, raise awareness about sports, and establish a sustainable sports culture. By successfully meeting the standards of a Sports-Friendly Campus, our university has affirmed its commitment to a holistic educational approach that prioritizes healthy living.
